title: campnosperma macrophyllum
intro: Campnosperma macrophyllum, also known as the giant stinkwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Campnosperma macrophyllum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems such as bronchitis. The plant is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or paste, and is used in herbal remedies to treat a range of ailments.
